name: import
summary: Reads survey data in different formats (currently processed centreline in *.3d, *.plt, *.xyz formats). Survey stations may be referenced in scraps etc. When importing a Survex 3D file, stations are inserted in the survey hierarchy if there exists an identical hierarchy to that in 3D file.

options.raw: filter <prefix> = if specified, only stations with given prefix and shots between them will be imported. Prefix will be removed from station names.
options.name: filter <prefix>
options.description: if specified, only stations with given prefix and shots between them will be imported. Prefix will be removed from station names.

options.raw: surveys (create)/use/ignore = specifies how to import survey structure (works only with .3d files). create = split stations into subsurveys, if subsurveys do not exist, create them use = split stations into existing subsurveys ignore = do not split stations into sub-surveys
options.name: surveys (create)/use/ignore
options.description: specifies how to import survey structure (works only with .3d files). create = split stations into subsurveys, if subsurveys do not exist, create them use = split stations into existing subsurveys ignore = do not split stations into sub-surveys

options.raw: cs <coordinate system> = coordinate system for stations with fixed coordinates
options.name: cs <coordinate system>
options.description: coordinate system for stations with fixed coordinates

options.raw: calibrate [<x> <y> <z> <X> <Y> <Z>] = coordinates in the imported file are shifted from lower-case coordinates to upper-case coordinates.
options.name: calibrate [<x> <y> <z> <X> <Y> <Z>]
options.description: coordinates in the imported file are shifted from lower-case coordinates to upper-case coordinates.
